items.label: STR runs 1-3 add to cart end-to-end
addItem response no MAX_LENGTH_EXCEEDED for preset

items.note: Server rejects correctly and cart state stays unchanged, but no toast/inline error is surfaced to the user. Recommend follow-up bug.

items.label: Custom input 'abc' (3 chars) Add still works
No new console errors / 4xx/5xx on graphql
Custom textbox clear on switch to preset

side_effects.note: Other configurable product still adds to cart cleanly; no regression in shared add-to-cart.vue path.

Server validation error message is technical: 'Configuration section CustomText exceeds the maximum allowed length of 5 characters'. Recommend design-system review for friendlier user-facing copy. NOT a blocker.
Edit mode does not pre-fill the existing customText / radio selection. Out of scope for VCST-4987.

graphql_evidence.validation_error_message: Configuration section CustomText exceeds the maximum allowed length of 5 characters

business_rules_verified: BL-CART-* (configurable line item add returns full cart with itemsQuantity:1)
VCST-4987 invariant: IsPredefinedTextOptionSelected() bypasses maxLength when customText matches a preset.text (TEST_QA 7 > maxLength 5 accepted)
VCST-4987 server symmetry: CartAggregate.UpdateConfiguredLineItemAsync now validates and returns errors instead of persisting

recommendation.primary: Verified / Ready for Closure — Original VCST-4987 symptom no longer reproduces.

follow_ups.title: Update-cart toast does not surface cart-level CONFIGURATION_SECTION_CUSTOM_TEXT_MAX_LENGTH_EXCEEDED to user; user sees silent no-op.
